item.title: Are Costco Baked Goods Worth It?
item.description: Taking a closer look at Costco baked goods and sharing a taste test to see how they compare.

media:content.media:title: Are Costco Baked Goods Worth It?

item.title: Less Oil, No Spatter, No Double Frying!
item.description: I'm testing a method of cooking french fries that begins with cold oil, resulting in perfectly cooked fries with no spatter, less oil, AND no double frying. Let's do this!

media:content.media:title: Less Oil, No Spatter, No Double Frying!
media:content.media:description: I'm testing a method of cooking french fries that begins with cold oil, resulting in perfectly cooked fries with no spatter, less oil, AND no double frying. Let's do this!
